creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
Indeed, thanks you for the report.

pkg info -f tigervnc-viewer
tigervnc-viewer-1.10.1_1
Name           : tigervnc-viewer
Version        : 1.10.1_1
Installed on   : Sat Feb 22 21:28:35 2020 JST
Origin         : net/tigervnc-viewer
Architecture   : FreeBSD:12:amd64
Prefix         : /usr/local
Categories     : net x11-servers
Licenses       : GPLv2+
Maintainer     : meta@FreeBSD.org
WWW            : https://tigervnc.org/
Comment        : TigerVNC Viewer
Options        :
        DOCS           : on
        GNUTLS         : on
        NLS            : on
Shared Libs required:
        libX11.so.6
        libXrender.so.1
        libXext.so.6
        libjpeg.so.8
        libXcursor.so.1
        libICE.so.6
        libXft.so.2
        libfltk.so.1.3
        libintl.so.8
        libgnutls.so.30
        libSM.so.6
        libfontconfig.so.1
        libfltk_images.so.1.3
        libXinerama.so.1
        libXfixes.so.3
Annotations    :
        FreeBSD_version: 1201512
Flat size      : 796KiB
Description    :
This port provides server components of TigerVNC.

TigerVNC is a high-performance, platform-neutral implementation of VNC,
a client/server application that allows users to launch and interact with
graphical applications on remote machines.

WWW: https://tigervnc.org/
